{{CargoRelic
|name=Otter's Treasure
|class_id=20629
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This exquisitely designed shell is a treasure cherished for many years by a sea otter. During this time, it continuously processed the shell with materials it collected, eventually crafting it into the stunning masterpiece it is today, resembling a work of art!
|fame=15
|art=31
|fth=18
|civ=15
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail DEF +10<br>Per Sea Area conquered, Snail ATK +5<br>Areas of Mysterious Sea Conquered: 6/6
|ss2=Snail DEF +20<br>Per Sea Area conquered, Snail ATK +10<br>Areas of Mysterious Sea Conquered: 6/6
|ss3=Snail DEF +30<br>Per Sea Area conquered, Snail ATK +15<br>Areas of Mysterious Sea Conquered: 6/6
|ss4=Snail DEF +30<br>Per Sea Area conquered, Snail ATK +15<br>Areas of Mysterious Sea Conquered: 6/6
|ss7=Snail DEF +30<br>Per Sea Area conquered, Snail ATK +15<br>Areas of Mysterious Sea Conquered: 6/6<br> (Awakened)
}}
